tools.name: create_data_table
tools.description: Create a new DataTable asset targeting an existing FTableRowBase-derived struct. DataTables are used for game balancing, item databases, weapon stats, dialogue, and more. After creation, use import_json_to_datatable to populate rows.

asset_path.description: Content path for the new DataTable (e.g., '/Game/Data/DT_Weapons')

row_struct.description: Name of the FTableRowBase-derived struct (e.g., 'FWeaponStatsRow', 'FCharacterInfoRow'). Must be compiled and available.

tools.name: import_json_to_datatable
tools.description: Import JSON data into an existing DataTable. Each row object must have a 'Name' field (row key) and properties matching the struct's UPROPERTY names exactly. Replaces all existing rows.

asset_path.description: Content path of the target DataTable (e.g., '/Game/Data/DT_Weapons')

json_data.description: JSON array of row objects. Each must have 'Name' as the row key. Example: '[{"Name":"Sword","Damage":50,"Speed":1.2},{"Name":"Axe","Damage":80,"Speed":0.8}]'
